'''Biohazard''' continues the storyline after the [[Plague City]] quest. The plot deepens as [[Elena]] finally gets a chance to process her [[plague sample]]s. Buried under these samples lies a well-hidden secret.

==Details==
{{Quest details
|start = Talk to [[Elena]] in her house in [[East Ardougne]].
|startmap = 2592,3336
|difficulty = Novice
|description = This is the second part of an ongoing adventure. Help Elena discover the truth about the infamous Ardougne plague.

Smuggle test samples across Ardougne to Elena's old mentor.
|length = Short
|requirements = *Completion of [[Plague City]]
|items =
* [[Priest gown top]] and [[Priest gown bottom|bottom]] (can be obtained for free during the quest)
* [[Gas mask]] (can be obtained for free from the cupboard in [[Edmond]] and [[Alrena]]'s house in [[East Ardougne]])
|recommended = * {{SCP|Combat|10|link=yes}}
*[[Weight-reducing clothing]] and [[Stamina potion|stamina]] or [[energy potion]]s
*Fast travel to several locations
**[[East Ardougne]] to start the quest plus 1-2 trips - [[Ardougne Teleport]] or [[Skills necklace]] to [[Fishing Guild]] or [[Spirit tree]] to [[Battlefield]] or [[fairy ring]] to {{fairycode|djp}} or [[Captain Barnaby]]'s ship from [[Rimmington]] or [[Brimhaven]]
**[[Rimmington]] (1 trip) - [[Teleport to House]] (the default house location is Rimmington) or [[Skills necklace]] to the Crafting Guild or [[Rat Pits]] [[minigame]] teleport
**[[Varrock]] (1 trip) - [[Varrock teleport]] or [[Chronicle]] or [[Skills necklace]] to [[Crafting Guild]] or [[Ring of wealth]] to [[Grand Exchange]]
|kills = * [[Mourner (boss)|Mourner]] ''(level 13)''

==Walkthrough==
===Sneaking back===
{{Needed|[[gas mask]], two free inventory spaces}}
[[File:Elena chathead.png|left|frameless]]
{{Map|2614,3325|mtype=rectangle|rectX=8|rectY=6|caption=Jerico's house with pigeon cages and bird food.|align=right|width=200|height=200}}
{{Map|mtype=polygon|2559,3267|2561,3267|2561,3262|2557,3262|2557,3264|2559,3264|caption=Omart's location.|align=left|width=200|height=200}}
Talk to [[Elena]] in [[East Ardougne]], directly west of the shortcut log. The mourners have confiscated her [[distillator]], which she needs to test plague samples. She wants you to retrieve it, but the tunnel the player used to enter West Ardougne last time has been filled in. She suggests you talk to her father's friend [[Jerico]], who has a method of communication with [[West Ardougne]].

[[Jerico]] can be found in a house just south of the northern bank, and just north of the [[chapel]]. Talk to him, and he will tell you that he has used messenger pigeons to communicate with two friends who are going to help you with a rope ladder to cross the wall.

Open and search the [[cupboard (Jerico's house)|cupboard]] on the north wall to find some [[bird feed]], then go behind the house to grab a [[pigeon cage]].

Ensure you have your gas mask, then speak to [[Omart]], who can be found by the wall just north of the [[Battlefield]] [[Spirit tree]], near [[Ceril Carnillean]]'s house. He will ask you to create a distraction to occupy the watchtower guards before his assistant [[Kilron]] can help you over the wall.

[[File:Biohazard - Releasing the pigeons.png|thumb|200px|Creating a distraction.]]
Head to the small watchtower along the wall, directly north of [[Omart]]. Stand in the corner where the two spiked fences meet, put the [[bird feed]] on either fence, then click the cage in your inventory to create the distraction.

Go back and talk to [[Omart]], who will call out to [[Kilron]] to throw over the rope ladder. With the [[gas mask]] equipped, climb over the ladder into [[West Ardougne]].
{{Clear|left}}

===Infiltrating the Mourner HQ===
{{Needed|Combat equipment to kill the level 13 Mourner, four free inventory spaces}}
[[File:Biohazard - Mourner Tunnels.png|thumb|left|200px|Mourner HQ.]]
{{Map|2517,3274|mtype=rectangle|rectX=4|rectY=8|caption=Nurse Sarah's house.|align=right|width=200|height=200}}
Head to the [[Mourner Headquarters|Mourners' headquarters]] located in the north-eastern corner of the city. If you tried to enter you would not be allowed in; instead, head to the western side and squeeze through a [[fence (Biohazard)|gap in the fence]] into the backyard. Pick up the [[rotten apple]] laying on the ground just to the west of the fence hole, and right click to use it on the stew that is brewing in the cauldron for the mourners. If you tried to enter the headquarters again, they would complain that several mourners have been taken ill with food poisoning, and are in need of a nurse.

Head to [[nurse Sarah]]'s house - the large building south-west of the [[West Ardougne]] church. Search the [[cupboard (Nurse Sarah's house)|cupboard]] in the northern part of her house to obtain a [[medical gown]]. Equip the gown, and go back to the headquarters. The professional attire will easily fool the mourners into letting you into their base. For all subsequent visits to the headquarters during the quest, the gown must be worn at all times.

Go upstairs and kill a mourner. A [[Key (Biohazard)|key]] will automatically be placed in the player's inventory. Use the key on the [[gate (Biohazard)|gate]] to get inside the caged room. Search the [[crate (Biohazard)|crate]] third from the left on the northern wall to find [[Elena]]'s [[distillator]].

'''Note''': [[Rings of recoil]] work against the mourner, after talking to him he will attack you and the key will still drop.

Go back to [[Elena]] by climbing down the [[manhole (West Ardougne)|manhole]] in the middle of the city and climbing the mud pile. Alternatively, [[Kilron]] at the south-eastern corner of [[West Ardougne]] will help the player get back over into [[East Ardougne]].

Speak to [[Elena]] and the player will give her the distillator. After running the tests, she will be confused to find that the touch paper hasn't changed colour at all. She will give you a [[plague sample]], [[liquid honey]], [[ethenea]], and [[sulphuric broline]], and ask you to visit her old mentor [[Guidor]] in [[Varrock]] for guidance. First, you will need to visit the [[Chemist]] in [[Rimmington]] to obtain more [[touch paper]] and to find a way to smuggle the three vials into [[Varrock]].

===Smuggling goods===
{{Needed| [[Liquid honey]], [[ethenea]], [[sulphuric broline]], the [[plague sample]], and one free inventory space}}
{{Map|2933,3210|mtype=rectangle|rectX=16|rectY=8|caption=The chemist's location.|align=right|width=200|height=200}}
[[File:Chemist chathead.png|left|80px|frameless]]
Make your way to the [[Chemist]] in western [[Rimmington]], who will give you the [[touch paper]]; you need to have the [[plague sample]] in your inventory to talk to him about the quest.

'''Note''': You may fast travel to [[Rimmington]]; the vials used to break when doing so, but this is no longer the case. For a list of transportation options to Rimmington [[Rimmington#Transportation|see here]].

The chemist will advise you to use his errand boys to deliver the goods, but warns you that they have a habit of stealing, and that you must give them each something they have no reason to steal.

{|class="wikitable"
|-
!Helper
!Sample Vial
!Reason
|-
|[[Da Vinci]]
|[[File:Ethenea.png]][[Ethenea]]
|Da Vinci cannot use the ethenea to create a "work of art".
|-
|[[Chancy]]
|[[File:Liquid honey.png]][[Liquid honey]]
|Owing to its low value, Chancy cannot wager the liquid honey in a gamble.
|-
|[[Hops (Biohazard)|Hops]]
|[[File:Sulphuric broline.png]][[Sulphuric broline]]
|Hops will not drink it because of its poisonous nature.
|}

Chancy the gambler, Da Vinci the artist, and Hops the drinker are located right outside the chemist's house crowding around a fire. Talk to each of them to give them their respective vials. If you give the wrong vial to someone, give the remaining vials to the others, speak to them all in Varrock, then return to Elena to get new vials before repeating this step.

===So far, so good===
{{Needed|A [[priest gown]] top and bottom, the [[plague sample]] and [[touch paper]], and three free inventory spaces}}
{{Map|3271,3392|mtype=rectangle|rectX=10|rectY=8|caption=The Dancing Donkey Inn's location.|align=right|width=220|height=220}}
[[File:Guidor.png|left|frameless|80px]]
Head to the fenced-in enclosure in south-eastern Varrock. The guard will search you when you try and pass through the gate, but will not find the plague sample; he will however confiscate the vials if you forgot to give them to the errand boys, and you will need to repeat the step.

The errand boys can be found in the [[Dancing Donkey Inn]] inside this area. With the plague sample in your inventory and '''three free inventory slots''', talk to Hops, Da Vinci, and Chancy to get the vials back. If your inventory is full when you talk to them, you will need to obtain a new set from the chemist.

{{Colour|red|Warning:}} Now that you have the vials, '''do not leave the fenced area''', or they will be confiscated on return. If you forgot your plague sample or touch paper, you can drop the vials at the gate, quickly retrieve your items from the [[Varrock east bank]] and then pick up the vials again.

Guidor is ill, and his wife [[Julie]] will not let anyone visit him, though she wishes for him to see a priest. If you didn't bring a [[priest gown]], you can obtain one for free by talking to [[Asyff]] in the [[Fancy Clothes Store]] in this area. Equip your [[priest gown]] and then talk to [[Guidor]] in his house in the south-eastern corner of the gated area. Give him the vials and sample, and tell him that [[Elena]] has sent a sample that needs to be processed. After analysing it, he will come to the conclusion that there is no plague - someone has been lying about it.

===Exposing the lie===
[[File:King Lathas chathead.png|left|frameless]]
Return to [[Ardougne]], and talk to Elena. When you tell her that [[Guidor]] found nothing in his results, she suggests that the plague must be a hoax and that you should speak to the person on top of this - [[King Lathas]] of [[East Ardougne]]. King Lathas is located just south of Elena's house, in his throne-room on the {{FloorNumber|uk=1}} of the East [[Ardougne Castle]].

When told that the plague is in fact a hoax, the King replies that he did it for the best of his people, and that it protects them from a "far greater danger". He then tells the player about the journey of [[King Tyras]] - the king of [[West Ardougne]] and King Lathas's brother - towards the west and that he has been corrupted by the [[Dark Lord]] after drinking from the Chalice of Eternity. Hence, the wall has been erected between the cities to protect [[East Ardougne]] and in turn, all of [[Gielinor]].

'''Congratulations, quest complete!'''

==Rewards==
{{Quest rewards
|name = Biohazard
|image = [[File:Biohazard reward scroll.png|centre]]
|qp = 3
|rewards =
*{{SCP|Thieving|1,250}} [[Thieving]] [[experience]]
*Use of the [[Combat Training Camp]] north of the city. Players can attack a total of six training dummies in the camp for 50 attack experience each.
*The ability to travel freely through the [[West Ardougne]] gate.
*The ability to use the [[West Ardougne Teleport]] in the [[Arceuus spellbook]] and teletab.
}}

==Required for completing==
Completion of Biohazard is required for the following:
*[[Recipe for Disaster]]: [[Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Lumbridge Guide|Freeing the Lumbridge Guide]]
*[[Underground Pass]]
*[[Ardougne Diary#Easy|Ardougne Diary (Easy)]]

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 25 July 2019
|update = Song of the Elves
|change = 
* Teleporting with the plague sample and vials no longer breaks them.
* The errand boy hands over the vials faster.
* Talking to the Chemist or Guidor does not affect quest items.
}}
{{Subject changes footer}}

==Trivia==
*[[Da Vinci]] is a reference to the famous multi-talented Italian, {{wp|Leonardo da Vinci}}.
*The name of the man who helps you get over the wall, [[Jerico]], could be a reference to {{wp|Battle of Jericho|Jericho's wall}}.

{{Biohazard}}
